name: Elara Starbinder
sd_appearance: A slender Aasimar with radiant golden hair, piercing celestial eyes, and skin that catches light oddly, stands in the dimly lit Glass Sigil Library. She wears a pale blue scholar's robe, the fabric adorned with brass instrument clips and fastened by a belt with glass-lens goggles hanging from it. Her hands, stained with ink from countless hours of work, clasp a staff in one hand, and a quiver of scroll cases rests on her back. A distinctive pair of thick, rimless reading lenses perched on her nose, casting an intriguing glow as they reflect the flickering candlelight from the surrounding bookshelves.
faction_visual: pale blue scholar robes, brass instrument clips, glass-lens goggles, ink-stained hands
style_note: ink-stained hands, reading lenses, reinforced elbows, multiple scroll cases
